---

_**Assistant**_

I'll explain the error and the solution in detail:

The error you encountered was:
```
Error: The optional dependency fsevents failed to install and is required for watch mode. Use --no-optional to suppress this message or try installing it manually with npm install fsevents.
```

This error typically occurs when:
1. You copy a project from one machine to another (especially between different operating systems)
2. The `node_modules` folder and lock file (`pnpm-lock.yaml`) are copied along with the project

The solution involved these steps:

1. **Remove the existing node_modules and lock file**:
   - The `node_modules` folder contains platform-specific dependencies
   - The lock file (`pnpm-lock.yaml`) contains specific versions and checksums that might not match your new environment

2. **Reinstall dependencies fresh**:
   - Running `pnpm install` creates a new `node_modules` folder with dependencies specific to your current environment
   - It also generates a new lock file that matches your system

To prevent this issue in the future:

1. **When copying projects**:
   - Never copy the `node_modules` folder
   - Never copy the lock file (`pnpm-lock.yaml` or `package-lock.json`)
   - Only copy the source code and `package.json`

2. **Best practices for project transfer**:
   ```
   - Copy only:
     - src/ (source code)
     - public/ (static files)
     - package.json
     - Other configuration files (vite.config.ts, tsconfig.json, etc.)
   
   - Do NOT copy:
     - node_modules/
     - pnpm-lock.yaml
     - .next/ (if using Next.js)
     - dist/ (build output)
   ```

3. **After copying**:
   ```bash
   pnpm install
   pnpm dev
   ```

This ensures that all dependencies are properly installed for your specific environment and operating system. The `fsevents` error you saw is particularly common when moving between macOS and Windows, as `fsevents` is a macOS-specific dependency that's optional on other platforms.

```diff
+ import { ShieldAlert, LayoutDashboard, FileType, Shield, FileText } from 'lucide-react';
+ import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
+ import { ScrollArea } from "@/components/ui/scroll-area";
+ import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
+ 
+ interface SidebarProps {
+   isDarkMode: boolean;
+   showCompactSidebar: boolean;
+   currentPage: string;
+   setCurrentPage: (page: string) => void;
+   setShowCompactSidebar: (show: boolean) => void;
+ }
+ 
+ const navItems = [
+   { id: 'dashboard', label: 'Dashboard', icon: LayoutDashboard },
+   { id: 'convert', label: 'Convert Files', icon: FileType },
+   { id: 'scan', label: 'AV Scan', icon: Shield },
+   { id: 'logs', label: 'Scan Logs', icon: FileText },
+ ];
+ 
+ export function Sidebar({ 
+   isDarkMode, 
+   showCompactSidebar, 
+   currentPage, 
+   setCurrentPage,
+   setShowCompactSidebar 
+ }: SidebarProps) {
+   return (
+     <div className={cn(
+       "border-r transition-all duration-300 flex flex-col",
+       isDarkMode 
+         ? "bg-slate-900 text-white border-slate-700/50" 
+         : "bg-[#2563eb] text-white border-blue-700/50",
+       showCompactSidebar ? "w-16" : "w-64"
+     )}>
+       {/* Logo & Brand */}
+       <div className={cn(
+         "flex items-center h-16",
+         isDarkMode ? "border-b border-slate-700/50" : "border-b border-blue-500",
+         showCompactSidebar ? "justify-center" : "px-4"
+       )}>
+         {showCompactSidebar ? (
+           <ShieldAlert className="h-8 w-8 text-white" />
+         ) : (
+           <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
+             <div className={cn(
+               "p-2 rounded-md", 
+               isDarkMode ? "bg-blue-500/20" : "bg-blue-500/20"
+             )}>
+               <ShieldAlert className="h-5 w-5 text-white" />
+             </div>
+             <span className="font-semibold text-lg text-white">AV Pipeline</span>
+           </div>
+         )}
+       </div>
+       
+       {/* Navigation */}
+       <ScrollArea className="flex-1">
+         <div className={cn("py-4", showCompactSidebar ? "px-2" : "px-3")}>
+           <nav className="space-y-1">
+             {navItems.map((item) => (
+               <Button
+                 key={item.id}
+                 variant="ghost"
+                 size={showCompactSidebar ? "icon" : "default"}
+                 className={cn(
+                   "w-full justify-start font-normal",
+                   currentPage === item.id 
+                     ? isDarkMode
+                       ? "bg-slate-800 hover:bg-slate-700 text-white" 
+                       : "bg-blue-700 hover:bg-blue-800 text-white"
+                     : isDarkMode 
+                       ? "text-slate-300 hover:text-white hover:bg-slate-800" 
+                       : "text-white hover:text-white hover:bg-blue-700/80",
+                   showCompactSidebar ? "h-12 w-12 rounded-lg" : "px-3 h-10 rounded-lg"
+                 )}
+                 onClick={() => setCurrentPage(item.id)}
+               >
+                 <item.icon className={cn(
+                   showCompactSidebar ? "h-5 w-5" : "h-5 w-5 mr-3",
+                 )} />
+                 {!showCompactSidebar && <span>{item.label}</span>}
+               </Button>
+             ))}
+           </nav>
+         </div>
+       </ScrollArea>
+       
+       {/* Toggle sidebar width */}
+       <div className={cn(
+         "p-3 flex justify-center",
+         isDarkMode ? "border-t border-slate-700/50" : "border-t border-blue-500"
+       )}>
+         <Button 
+           variant="ghost" 
+           size="icon" 
+           onClick={() => setShowCompactSidebar(!showCompactSidebar)}
+           aria-label={showCompactSidebar ? "Expand sidebar" : "Collapse sidebar"}
+           className={cn(

+           ) : (
+             <ChevronLeft className="h-5 w-5" />
+           )}
+         </Button>
+       </div>
+     </div>
+   );
+ }
```

```diff
+ import { Switch } from "@/components/ui/switch";
+ import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
+ import { Progress } from "@/components/ui/progress";
+ 
+ interface AVEngine {
+   id: string;
+   name: string;
+   status: string;
+   available: boolean;
+   enabled: boolean;
+   lastUpdate: string;
+   progress: number;
+   infected: number;
+   scanned: number;
+ }
+ 
+ interface AVEngineCardProps {
+   engine: AVEngine;
+   onToggle: (id: string) => void;
+ }
+ 
+ export function AVEngineCard({ engine, onToggle }: AVEngineCardProps) {
+   return (
+     <Card>
+       <CardHeader className="pb-3">
+         <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
+           <CardTitle className="text-lg font-medium">{engine.name}</CardTitle>
+           <Switch
+             checked={engine.enabled}
+             onCheckedChange={() => onToggle(engine.id)}
+             disabled={!engine.available}
+           />
+         </div>
+       </CardHeader>
+       <CardContent>
+         <div className="space-y-2">
+           <div className="flex justify-between text-sm">
+             <span className="text-muted-foreground">Status:</span>
+             <span className="font-medium">{engine.status}</span>
+           </div>
+           <div className="flex justify-between text-sm">
+             <span className="text-muted-foreground">Last Update:</span>
+             <span className="font-medium">{engine.lastUpdate}</span>
+           </div>
+           {engine.status === 'scanning' && (
+             <>
+               <Progress value={engine.progress} className="h-2" />
+               <div className="flex justify-between text-sm">
+                 <span className="text-muted-foreground">Scanned:</span>
+                 <span className="font-medium">{engine.scanned}</span>
+               </div>
+               <div className="flex justify-between text-sm">
+                 <span className="text-muted-foreground">Infected:</span>
+                 <span className="font-medium text-red-500">{engine.infected}</span>
+               </div>
+             </>
+           )}
+         </div>
+       </CardContent>
+     </Card>
+   );
+ } 
```

```diff
+ export function ScanPage() {

+ 
+   const toggleAvEngine = (id: string) => {
+     setAvEngines(engines => 
+       engines.map(engine => 
+         engine.id === id ? { ...engine, enabled: !engine.enabled } : engine

+     );

+ 
+   const handleScan = () => {
+     if (!selectedPath) return;
+     setScanning(true);

+         <div className="flex gap-4">

+             placeholder="Select folder or file to scan..."
+             value={selectedPath}
+             onChange={(e) => setSelectedPath(e.target.value)}
+             className="flex-1"
+           />
+           <Button onClick={handleScan} disabled={!selectedPath || scanning}>
+             <UploadCloud className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />

+             key={engine.id}
+             engine={engine}
+             onToggle={toggleAvEngine}
+           />
+         ))}
+       </div>
+     </div>
+   );
+ }
```

```diff
+ import { Card, CardContent } from "@/components/ui/card";
+ import { Mail, Inbox, FileArchive, FileText, UploadCloud } from 'lucide-react';
+ 
+ const conversionTypes = [
+   { id: 'eml', label: 'EML → HTML', icon: Mail },
+   { id: 'msg', label: 'MSG → HTML', icon: Inbox },
+   { id: 'pst', label: 'PST → HTML', icon: FileArchive },
+   { id: 'word', label: 'Word → PDF', icon: FileText },
+ ];
+ 
+ export function ConvertPage() {
+   const [selectedFormat, setSelectedFormat] = useState('eml');
+   const [selectedPath, setSelectedPath] = useState('');
+   const [converting, setConverting] = useState(false);
+ 
+   const handleConvert = () => {
+     if (!selectedPath || !selectedFormat) return;
+     setConverting(true);
+     // Implement conversion logic here
+   };
+ 
+   return (
+     <div className="p-6 space-y-6">
+       <div className="space-y-4">
+         <h2 className="text-2xl font-semibold">Convert Files</h2>
+         
+         <Card>
+           <CardContent className="p-6 space-y-4">
+             <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
+               <div className="space-y-2">
+                 <label className="text-sm font-medium">Conversion Type</label>
+                 <Select value={selectedFormat} onValueChange={setSelectedFormat}>
+                   <SelectTrigger>
+                     <SelectValue placeholder="Select format" />
+                   </SelectTrigger>
+                   <SelectContent>
+                     {conversionTypes.map((type) => (
+                       <SelectItem key={type.id} value={type.id}>
+                         <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
+                           <type.icon className="h-4 w-4" />
+                           <span>{type.label}</span>
+                         </div>
+                       </SelectItem>
+                     ))}
+                   </SelectContent>
+                 </Select>
+               </div>
+ 
+               <div className="space-y-2">
+                 <label className="text-sm font-medium">File or Folder Path</label>
+                 <Input
+                   placeholder="Select files to convert..."
+                   value={selectedPath}
+                   onChange={(e) => setSelectedPath(e.target.value)}
+                 />
+               </div>
+             </div>
+ 
+             <div className="flex justify-end">
+               <Button onClick={handleConvert} disabled={!selectedPath || !selectedFormat || converting}>
+                 <UploadCloud className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
+                 Start Conversion
+               </Button>
+             </div>
+           </CardContent>
+         </Card>
+       </div>
+     </div>
+   );
+ }
```

---

I've now restructured the application into a component-based architecture. Here's what I did:

1. Created a component structure:
   ```
   src/
   ├── components/
   │   ├── layout/
   │   │   └── Sidebar.tsx
   │   ├── dashboard/
   │   │   ├── Dashboard.tsx
   │   │   └── StatsCard.tsx
   │   ├── scan/
   │   │   ├── ScanPage.tsx
   │   │   └── AVEngineCard.tsx
   │   └── convert/
   │       └── ConvertPage.tsx
   └── types/
       └── index.ts
   ```

2. Separated components by feature:
   - `layout/`: Contains layout components like Sidebar
   - `dashboard/`: Dashboard-related components
   - `scan/`: AV scanning related components
   - `convert/`: File conversion related components

3. Created reusable components:
   - `StatsCard.tsx`: Reusable card for statistics
   - `AVEngineCard.tsx`: Reusable card for AV engines

4. Added type definitions:
   - Created `types/index.ts` with shared interfaces
   - Improved type safety across components

5. Simplified the main `App.tsx`:
   - Moved page components to their own files
   - Added a simple page routing system
   - Kept only the essential state at the app level

The application now follows best practices for React and Next.js development:
1. Component-based architecture
2. Separation of concerns
3. Reusable components
4. Type safety
5. Clean and maintainable code structure

Each component is now responsible for its own logic and state, making the code more maintainable and easier to test. The output and functionality remain exactly the same, but the code is now better organized and follows component-based architecture principles.

```diff
+ import { Settings, Sun, Moon } from 'lucide-react';
+ import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
+ import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
+ 
+ interface HeaderProps {
+   isDarkMode: boolean;
+   toggleDarkMode: () => void;
+   currentPage: string;
+ }
+ 
+ export function Header({ isDarkMode, toggleDarkMode, currentPage }: HeaderProps) {
+   const navItems = [
+     { id: 'dashboard', label: 'Dashboard' },
+     { id: 'convert', label: 'Convert Files' },
+     { id: 'scan', label: 'AV Scan' },
+     { id: 'logs', label: 'Scan Logs' },
+   ];
+ 
+   return (
+     <header className="h-16 border-b border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 flex items-center justify-between px-6 bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 shadow-sm">
+       <div className="flex items-center">
+         <h1 className="text-xl font-semibold text-slate-800 dark:text-white">
+           {navItems.find(item => item.id === currentPage)?.label}
+         </h1>
+       </div>
+ 
+       <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
+         <Button variant="outline" size="sm" className="gap-1.5 border-slate-300 dark:border-slate-600">
+           <Settings className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
+           <span>Settings</span>
+         </Button>
+         <Button
+           variant="ghost"
+           size="icon"
+           onClick={toggleDarkMode}
+           className="rounded-full"
+         >
+           {isDarkMode ? (
+             <Sun className="h-4 w-4" />
+           ) : (
+             <Moon className="h-4 w-4" />
+           )}
+         </Button>
+       </div>
+     </header>
+   );
+ } 
```

Now let's create the routing setup. First, let's create the main layout component:

---

```diff
- 
+ import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
+ import { Outlet, useLocation } from 'react-router-dom';
+ import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
+ import { Sidebar } from '@/components/layout/Sidebar';
+ import { Header } from '@/components/layout/Header';
+ 
+ export function RootLayout() {
+   const [isDarkMode, setIsDarkMode] = useState(false);
+   const [showCompactSidebar, setShowCompactSidebar] = useState(false);
+   const location = useLocation();
+ 
+   // Get current page from pathname
+   const currentPage = location.pathname.split('/')[1] || 'dashboard';
+ 
+   // Effect to toggle dark mode
+   useEffect(() => {
+     document.documentElement.classList.toggle('dark', isDarkMode);
+   }, [isDarkMode]);
+ 
+   const toggleDarkMode = () => {
+     setIsDarkMode(!isDarkMode);
+   };
+ 
+   return (
+     <div className={cn("min-h-screen flex bg-background text-foreground font-sans", isDarkMode && "dark")}>
+       <Sidebar
+         isDarkMode={isDarkMode}
+         showCompactSidebar={showCompactSidebar}
+         currentPage={currentPage}
+         setShowCompactSidebar={setShowCompactSidebar}
+       />
+ 
+       <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col h-screen overflow-hidden">
+         <Header
+           isDarkMode={isDarkMode}
+           toggleDarkMode={toggleDarkMode}
+           currentPage={currentPage}
+         />
+ 
+         <main className="flex-1 overflow-auto bg-slate-100 dark:bg-slate-900">
+           <Outlet />
+         </main>
+       </div>
+     </div>
+   );
+ } 
```

---

Now let's create the router setup:

---

```diff
- 
+ import { createBrowserRouter } from 'react-router-dom';
+ import { RootLayout } from '@/layouts/RootLayout';
+ import { Dashboard } from '@/pages/Dashboard';
+ import { Convert } from '@/pages/Convert';
+ import { Scan } from '@/pages/Scan';
+ import { Logs } from '@/pages/Logs';
+ 
+ export const router = createBrowserRouter([
+   {
+     path: '/',
+     element: <RootLayout />,
+     children: [
+       {
+         index: true,
+         element: <Dashboard />,
+       },
+       {
+         path: 'convert',
+         element: <Convert />,
+       },
+       {
+         path: 'scan',
+         element: <Scan />,
+       },
+       {
+         path: 'logs',
+         element: <Logs />,
+       },
+     ],
+   },
+ ]); 
```

```diff
+           <CardContent className="p-0">
+             <div className="divide-y divide-slate-200 dark:divide-slate-700">
+               <div className="p-4 flex items-start gap-3 hover:bg-slate-50 dark:hover:bg-slate-800/60 transition-colors">
+                 <div className="bg-green-100 text-green-600 dark:bg-green-900/30 dark:text-green-300 p-2 rounded-full">
+                   <CheckCircle className="h-5 w-5" />
+                 </div>
+                 <div>
+                   <p className="font-medium text-slate-800 dark:text-white">Scan completed</p>
+                   <p className="text-sm text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400">128 files scanned, no threats detected</p>
+                   <p className="text-xs text-slate-400 dark:text-slate-500 mt-1">Today at 9:45 AM</p>
+                 </div>
+               </div>
+               <div className="p-4 flex items-start gap-3 hover:bg-slate-50 dark:hover:bg-slate-800/60 transition-colors">
+                 <div className="bg-blue-100 text-blue-600 dark:bg-blue-900/30 dark:text-blue-300 p-2 rounded-full">
+                   <FileOutput className="h-5 w-5" />
+                 </div>
+                 <div>
+                   <p className="font-medium text-slate-800 dark:text-white">Conversion completed</p>
+                   <p className="text-sm text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400">45 EML files converted to HTML format</p>
+                   <p className="text-xs text-slate-400 dark:text-slate-500 mt-1">Yesterday at 4:12 PM</p>
+                 </div>
+               </div>
+               <div className="p-4 flex items-start gap-3 hover:bg-slate-50 dark:hover:bg-slate-800/60 transition-colors">
+                 <div className="bg-amber-100 text-amber-600 dark:bg-amber-900/30 dark:text-amber-300 p-2 rounded-full">
+                   <AlertTriangle className="h-5 w-5" />
+                 </div>
+                 <div>
+                   <p className="font-medium text-slate-800 dark:text-white">Quarantine alert</p>
+                   <p className="text-sm text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400">3 potentially malicious files were quarantined</p>
+                   <p className="text-xs text-slate-400 dark:text-slate-500 mt-1">Yesterday at 2:30 PM</p>
+                 </div>
+               </div>
+             </div>
+           </CardContent>
+           <div className="px-4 py-2 border-t border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800/50">
+             <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="w-full text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-300 justify-center gap-1.5">
```

```diff
- 
+ import { Upload, FileType, Settings, ArrowRight } from 'lucide-react';
+ import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
+ import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
+ import { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from "@/components/ui/tabs";
+ import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label";
+ import { Switch } from "@/components/ui/switch";
+ 
+ export function Convert() {
+   return (
+     <div className="container mx-auto py-6 px-4 md:px-6 max-w-7xl">
+       <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
+         {/* File Upload Section */}
+         <Card className="lg:col-span-2 shadow-sm border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700">
+           <CardHeader className="pb-3 border-b border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700">
+             <CardTitle className="text-lg font-semibold text-slate-800 dark:text-white">File Upload</CardTitle>
+           </CardHeader>
+           <CardContent>
+             <div className="mt-4">
+               <Tabs defaultValue="upload" className="w-full">
+                 <TabsList className="grid w-full grid-cols-2">
+                   <TabsTrigger value="upload">Upload Files</TabsTrigger>
+                   <TabsTrigger value="folder">Select Folder</TabsTrigger>
+                 </TabsList>
+                 <TabsContent value="upload" className="mt-4">
+                   <div className="flex items-center justify-center w-full">
+                     <label htmlFor="dropzone-file" className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center w-full h-64 border-2 border-dashed rounded-lg cursor-pointer bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800/50 border-slate-300 dark:border-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-100 dark:hover:bg-slate-800">
+                       <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center pt-5 pb-6">
+                         <Upload className="w-10 h-10 mb-3 text-slate-400" />
+                         <p className="mb-2 text-sm text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400">
+                           <span className="font-semibold">Click to upload</span> or drag and drop
+                         </p>
+                         <p className="text-xs text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400">
+                           EML, MSG, PST files (Max. 500MB)
+                         </p>
+                       </div>
+                       <input id="dropzone-file" type="file" className="hidden" multiple />
+                     </label>
+                   </div>
+                 </TabsContent>
+                 <TabsContent value="folder" className="mt-4">
+                   <div className="flex items-center justify-center w-full">
+                     <label htmlFor="folder-select" className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center w-full h-64 border-2 border-dashed rounded-lg cursor-pointer bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800/50 border-slate-300 dark:border-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-100 dark:hover:bg-slate-800">
+                       <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center pt-5 pb-6">
+                         <FileType className="w-10 h-10 mb-3 text-slate-400" />
+                         <p className="mb-2 text-sm text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400">
+                           <span className="font-semibold">Select a folder</span> to process
+                         </p>
+                         <p className="text-xs text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400">
+                           All supported files will be processed
+                         </p>
+                       </div>
+                       <input id="folder-select" type="file" webkitdirectory="true" className="hidden" />
+                     </label>
+                   </div>
+                 </TabsContent>
+               </Tabs>
+             </div>
+           </CardContent>
+         </Card>
+ 
+         {/* Conversion Settings */}
+         <Card className="shadow-sm border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700">
+           <CardHeader className="pb-3 border-b border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700">
+             <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
+               <Settings className="w-5 h-5 text-slate-500" />
+               <CardTitle className="text-lg font-semibold text-slate-800 dark:text-white">Settings</CardTitle>
+             </div>
+           </CardHeader>
+           <CardContent>
+             <div className="space-y-4 mt-4">
+               <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
+                 <div className="space-y-0.5">
+                   <Label className="text-sm font-medium">Preserve Attachments</Label>
+                   <div className="text-xs text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400">
+                     Keep original attachments
+                   </div>
+                 </div>
+                 <Switch />
+               </div>
+               <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
+                 <div className="space-y-0.5">
+                   <Label className="text-sm font-medium">Extract Metadata</Label>
+                   <div className="text-xs text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400">
+                     Include email metadata
+                   </div>
+                 </div>
+                 <Switch />
+               </div>
+               <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
+                 <div className="space-y-0.5">
+                   <Label className="text-sm font-medium">Scan for Threats</Label>
+                   <div className="text-xs text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400">
+                     Check files for malware
+                   </div>
+                 </div>
+                 <Switch defaultChecked />
+               </div>
+               <div className="pt-4 mt-4 border-t border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700">
+                 <Button className="w-full gap-2">
+                   Start Conversion
+                   <ArrowRight className="w-4 h-4" />
+                 </Button>
+               </div>
+             </div>
+           </CardContent>
+         </Card>
+       </div>
+     </div>
+   );
+ }
```

```diff
+   { id: 'word', label: 'Word → PDF', icon: FileWord, description: 'Convert Word documents to PDF format' },
+ ];
+ 
+ export default function Convert() {
+   const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState("files");
+   const [selectedFormat, setSelectedFormat] = useState('eml');
+   const [uploadMethod, setUploadMethod] = useState<'files' | 'folder'>('files');
+   const [isConverting, setIsConverting] = useState(false);
+   const [convertProgress, setConvertProgress] = useState(0);
+   const [processedFiles, setProcessedFiles] = useState<Array<{name: string, status: 'success' | 'error', message?: string}>>([]);
+   const [preserveOriginals, setPreserveOriginals] = useState(true);
+   const [selectedFiles, setSelectedFiles] = useState<FileList | null>(null);
+   
+   const fileInputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null);
+   const folderInputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null);
+ 
+   const handleFileSelect = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
+     if (e.target.files && e.target.files.length > 0) {
+       setSelectedFiles(e.target.files);
+     }
+   };
+   
+   const handleFileUploadClick = () => {
+     if (fileInputRef.current) {
+       fileInputRef.current.click();
+     }
+   };
+   
+   const handleFolderUploadClick = () => {
+     if (folderInputRef.current) {
+       folderInputRef.current.click();
+     }
+   };
+ 
+   const handleConvert = () => {
+     if (!selectedFiles || selectedFiles.length === 0) return;
+     
+     setIsConverting(true);
+     setConvertProgress(0);
+     setProcessedFiles([]);
+     
+     // Simulate conversion process
+     const totalFiles = selectedFiles.length;
+     let processed = 0;
+     
+     const interval = setInterval(() => {
+       processed++;
+       const progress = Math.round((processed / totalFiles) * 100);
+       setConvertProgress(progress);
+       
+       // Add a processed file with random status
+       const isSuccess = Math.random() > 0.1; // 90% success rate for demo
+       setProcessedFiles(prev => [
+         ...prev, 
+         {
+           name: selectedFiles[processed - 1].name,
+           status: isSuccess ? 'success' : 'error',
+           message: isSuccess ? undefined : 'Conversion failed: Unsupported format'
+         }
+       ]);
+       
+       if (processed >= totalFiles) {
+         clearInterval(interval);
+         setTimeout(() => setIsConverting(false), 500);
+       }
+     }, 300);
+   };
+ 
+   return (
+     <div className="container mx-auto py-6 px-4 md:px-6 max-w-7xl">
+       <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-6">File Conversion</h1>
+       
+       <Tabs defaultValue="files" value={activeTab} onValueChange={setActiveTab} className="w-full">
+         <TabsList className="grid grid-cols-3 mb-6">
+           <TabsTrigger value="files" className="flex items-center gap-2">
+             <Upload className="h-4 w-4" />
+             <span>File Upload</span>
+           </TabsTrigger>
+           <TabsTrigger value="folder" className="flex items-center gap-2">
+             <FolderOpen className="h-4 w-4" />
+             <span>Folder Upload</span>
+           </TabsTrigger>
+           <TabsTrigger value="settings" className="flex items-center gap-2">
+             <Settings className="h-4 w-4" />
+             <span>Settings</span>
+           </TabsTrigger>
+         </TabsList>
+         
+         <TabsContent value="files" className="space-y-6">
+           <Card>
+             <CardHeader>
+               <CardTitle>Convert Files</CardTitle>
+               <CardDescription>
+                 Upload individual files for conversion
+               </CardDescription>
+             </CardHeader>
+             <CardContent className="space-y-6">
+               <div>
+                 <Label htmlFor="format">Conversion Format</Label>
+                 <Select value={selectedFormat} onValueChange={setSelectedFormat}>
+                   <SelectTrigger className="mt-2">
+                     <SelectValue placeholder="Select format" />
+                   </SelectTrigger>
+                   <SelectContent>
+                     {conversionTypes.map((type) => (
+                       <SelectItem key={type.id} value={type.id}>
+                         <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
+                           <type.icon className="h-4 w-4" />
+                           <span>{type.label}</span>
+                         </div>
+                       </SelectItem>
+                     ))}
+                   </SelectContent>
+                 </Select>
+                 <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-2">
+                   {conversionTypes.find(t => t.id === selectedFormat)?.description}
+                 </p>
+               </div>
+               
+               <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-10 border-2 border-dashed rounded-lg bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800/50">
+                 <input
+                   type="file" 
+                   multiple
+                   className="hidden"
+                   ref={fileInputRef}
+                   onChange={handleFileSelect}
+                 />
+                 
+                 {selectedFiles && selectedFiles.length > 0 ? (
+                   <div className="text-center w-full">
+                     <CheckCircle className="h-10 w-10 text-green-500 mx-auto mb-4" />
+                     <p className="text-lg font-medium">{selectedFiles.length} files selected</p>
+                     <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mb-4">
+                       Ready for conversion
+                     </p>
+                     <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={handleFileUploadClick}>
+                       Select Different Files
+                     </Button>
+                   </div>
+                 ) : (
+                   <div className="text-center">
+                     <Upload className="h-10 w-10 text-muted-foreground mx-auto mb-4" />
+                     <p className="text-lg font-medium">Drag and drop your files here</p>
+                     <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mb-4">
+                       or click the button below to browse
+                     </p>
+                     <Button onClick={handleFileUploadClick}>
+                       Select Files
+                     </Button>
+                   </div>
+                 )}
+               </div>
+               
+               {selectedFiles && selectedFiles.length > 0 && (
+                 <div>
+                   <Button 
+                     className="w-full" 
+                     size="lg" 
+                     onClick={handleConvert}
+                     disabled={isConverting}
+                   >
+                     {isConverting ? (
+                       <>Converting Files...</>
+                     ) : (
+                       <>
+                         <FileDown className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
+                         Convert Files
+                       </>
+                     )}
+                   </Button>
+                 </div>
+               )}
+             </CardContent>
+           </Card>
+           
+           {isConverting && (
+             <Card>
+               <CardHeader>
+                 <CardTitle>Conversion Progress</CardTitle>
+               </CardHeader>
+               <CardContent className="space-y-4">
+                 <Progress value={convertProgress} className="h-2" />
+                 <p className="text-sm text-center">{convertProgress}% complete</p>
+                 
+                 <div className="border rounded-lg divide-y max-h-60 overflow-y-auto">
+                   {processedFiles.map((file, index) => (
+                     <div key={index} className="flex items-center justify-between p-3">
+                       <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
+                         {file.status === 'success' ? (
+                           <CheckCircle className="h-4 w-4 text-green-500" />
+                         ) : (
+                           <AlertCircle className="h-4 w-4 text-red-500" />
+                         )}
+                         <span className="text-sm truncate max-w-[300px]">{file.name}</span>
+                       </div>
+                       <Badge variant={file.status === 'success' ? 'outline' : 'destructive'}>
+                         {file.status === 'success' ? 'Converted' : 'Failed'}
+                       </Badge>
+                     </div>
+                   ))}
+                 </div>
+               </CardContent>
+             </Card>
+           )}
+         </TabsContent>
+         
+         <TabsContent value="folder" className="space-y-6">
+           <Card>
+             <CardHeader>
+               <CardTitle>Convert Folder</CardTitle>
+               <CardDescription>
+                 Upload an entire folder for batch conversion
+               </CardDescription>
+             </CardHeader>
+             <CardContent className="space-y-6">
+               <div>
+                 <Label htmlFor="format">Conversion Format</Label>
+                 <Select value={selectedFormat} onValueChange={setSelectedFormat}>
+                   <SelectTrigger className="mt-2">
+                     <SelectValue placeholder="Select format" />
+                   </SelectTrigger>
+                   <SelectContent>
+                     {conversionTypes.map((type) => (
+                       <SelectItem key={type.id} value={type.id}>
+                         <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
+                           <type.icon className="h-4 w-4" />
+                           <span>{type.label}</span>
+                         </div>
+                       </SelectItem>
+                     ))}
+                   </SelectContent>
+                 </Select>
+               </div>
+               
+               <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-10 border-2 border-dashed rounded-lg bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800/50">
+                 <input
+                   type="file" 
+                   webkitdirectory=""
+                   className="hidden"
+                   ref={folderInputRef}
+                   onChange={handleFileSelect}
+                 />
+                 
+                 {selectedFiles && selectedFiles.length > 0 ? (
+                   <div className="text-center w-full">
+                     <CheckCircle className="h-10 w-10 text-green-500 mx-auto mb-4" />
+                     <p className="text-lg font-medium">{selectedFiles.length} files selected</p>
+                     <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mb-4">
+                       Ready for conversion
+                     </p>
+                     <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={handleFolderUploadClick}>
+                       Select Different Folder
+                     </Button>
+                   </div>
+                 ) : (
+                   <div className="text-center">
+                     <FolderOpen className="h-10 w-10 text-muted-foreground mx-auto mb-4" />
+                     <p className="text-lg font-medium">Select a folder to convert</p>
+                     <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mb-4">
+                       All supported files in the folder will be processed
+                     </p>
+                     <Button onClick={handleFolderUploadClick}>
+                       Select Folder
+                     </Button>
+                   </div>
+                 )}
+               </div>
+               
+               {selectedFiles && selectedFiles.length > 0 && (
+                 <div>
+                   <Button 
+                     className="w-full" 
+                     size="lg" 
+                     onClick={handleConvert}
+                     disabled={isConverting}
+                   >
+                     {isConverting ? (
+                       <>Converting Files...</>
+                     ) : (
+                       <>
+                         <FileDown className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
+                         Convert Folder
+                       </>
+                     )}
+                   </Button>
+                 </div>
+               )}
+             </CardContent>
+           </Card>
+         </TabsContent>
+         
+         <TabsContent value="settings" className="space-y-4">
+           <Card>
+             <CardHeader>
+               <CardTitle>Conversion Settings</CardTitle>
+               <CardDescription>
+                 Configure how files are processed and stored
+               </CardDescription>
+             </CardHeader>
+             <CardContent className="space-y-6">
+               <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
+                 <div className="space-y-0.5">
+                   <Label htmlFor="preserve-originals">Preserve original files</Label>
+                   <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
+                     Keep the original files after conversion
+                   </p>
+                 </div>
+                 <Switch 
+                   id="preserve-originals" 
+                   checked={preserveOriginals}
+                   onCheckedChange={setPreserveOriginals}
+                 />
+               </div>
+               
+               <Separator />
+               
+               <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
+                 <div className="space-y-0.5">
+                   <Label htmlFor="output-format">Output location</Label>
+                   <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
+                     Where to save the converted files
+                   </p>
+                 </div>
+                 <Select defaultValue="same">
+                   <SelectTrigger className="w-[180px]">
+                     <SelectValue placeholder="Select location" />
+                   </SelectTrigger>
+                   <SelectContent>
+                     <SelectItem value="same">Same as source</SelectItem>
+                     <SelectItem value="custom">Custom location</SelectItem>
+                   </SelectContent>
+                 </Select>
+               </div>
+               
+               <Separator />
+               
+               <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
+                 <div className="space-y-0.5">
+                   <Label htmlFor="recursive">Process subfolders</Label>
+                   <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
+                     Also process files in subfolders
+                   </p>
+                 </div>
+                 <Switch id="recursive" defaultChecked />
+               </div>
+             </CardContent>
+           </Card>
+         </TabsContent>
+       </Tabs>
+     </div>
+   );
+ }
```

```diff
+ import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
+ import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
+ import { Shield, FolderOpen, AlertCircle, CheckCircle } from "lucide-react";
+ import { useState } from "react";
+ 
+ export function Scan() {
+   const [scanning, setScanning] = useState(false);
+   const [scanProgress, setScanProgress] = useState(0);
+   
+   const handleStartScan = () => {
+     setScanning(true);
+     setScanProgress(0);
+     
+     // Simulate scanning process
+     const interval = setInterval(() => {
+       setScanProgress(prev => {
+         const newProgress = prev + 5;
+         if (newProgress >= 100) {
+           clearInterval(interval);
+           setTimeout(() => setScanning(false), 500);
+           return 100;
+         }
+         return newProgress;
+       });
+     }, 300);
+   };
+   
+   return (
+     <div className="container mx-auto py-6 px-4 md:px-6 max-w-7xl">
+       <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-6">AV Scan</h1>
+       
+       <Card className="mb-6">
+         <CardHeader>
+           <CardTitle>Scan Files for Malware</CardTitle>
+           <CardDescription>
+             Scan your files and folders for potential threats
+           </CardDescription>
+         </CardHeader>
+         <CardContent className="space-y-6">
+           <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-10 border-2 border-dashed rounded-lg bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800/50">
+             <Shield className="h-10 w-10 text-blue-500 mx-auto mb-4" />
+             <p className="text-lg font-medium text-center">Ready to scan your files</p>
+             <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mb-4 text-center">
+               Click the button below to start scanning
+             </p>
+             <Button onClick={handleStartScan} disabled={scanning}>
+               <FolderOpen className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
+               {scanning ? "Scanning..." : "Start Scan"}
+             </Button>
+           </div>
+           
+           {scanning && (
+             <div className="mt-6 space-y-2">
+               <div className="w-full bg-gray-200 rounded-full h-2.5 dark:bg-gray-700">
+                 <div 
+                   className="bg-blue-600 h-2.5 rounded-full" 
+                   style={{ width: `${scanProgress}%` }}
+                 ></div>
+               </div>
+               <p className="text-sm text-center">{scanProgress}% complete</p>
+             </div>
+           )}
+         </CardContent>
+       </Card>
+       
+       {scanning && scanProgress > 50 && (
+         <Card>
+           <CardHeader>
+             <CardTitle>Scan Results</CardTitle>
+           </CardHeader>
+           <CardContent>
+             <div className="space-y-4">
+               <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
+                 <CheckCircle className="h-5 w-5 text-green-500" />
+                 <span>No threats detected in system files</span>
+               </div>
+               <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
+                 <CheckCircle className="h-5 w-5 text-green-500" />
+                 <span>No threats detected in documents</span>
+               </div>
+               <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
+                 <AlertCircle className="h-5 w-5 text-amber-500" />
+                 <span>Scan in progress for download folder...</span>
+               </div>
+             </div>
+           </CardContent>
+         </Card>
+       )}
+     </div>
+   );
+ } 
```

Finally, let's create a basic Logs page:

---

```diff
- 
+ import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
+ import { FileText, CheckCircle, AlertCircle, Shield, Clock } from "lucide-react";
+ import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
+ 
+ export function Logs() {
+   // Sample log data
+   const sampleLogs = [
+     { 
+       id: 1, 
+       filename: 'document.docx', 
+       scanDate: '2024-04-09 14:32', 
+       status: 'clean', 
+       engine: 'Windows Defender',
+       details: 'No threats detected'
+     },
+     { 
+       id: 2, 
+       filename: 'invoice.pdf', 
+       scanDate: '2024-04-09 13:45', 
+       status: 'clean', 
+       engine: 'ClamAV',
+       details: 'No threats detected'
+     },
+     { 
+       id: 3, 
+       filename: 'attachment.exe', 
+       scanDate: '2024-04-09 11:28', 
+       status: 'malicious', 
+       engine: 'ESET',
+       details: 'Trojan detected: Win32/Malware.ABC'
+     },
+     { 
+       id: 4, 
+       filename: 'download.zip', 
+       scanDate: '2024-04-08 16:04', 
+       status: 'suspicious', 
+       engine: 'Trend Micro',
+       details: 'Suspicious behavior detected'
+     },
+     { 
+       id: 5, 
+       filename: 'report.xlsx', 
+       scanDate: '2024-04-08 09:12', 
+       status: 'clean', 
+       engine: 'Windows Defender',
+       details: 'No threats detected'
+     },
+   ];
+ 
+   const getStatusBadge = (status: string) => {
+     switch(status) {
+       case 'clean':
+         return (
+           <Badge variant="outline" className="bg-green-50 text-green-700 border-green-200 dark:bg-green-900/30 dark:text-green-300 dark:border-green-800">
+             <CheckCircle className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" /> Clean
+           </Badge>
+         );
+       case 'malicious':
+         return (
+           <Badge variant="destructive" className="bg-red-50 text-red-700 border-red-200 dark:bg-red-900/30 dark:text-red-300 dark:border-red-800">
+             <AlertCircle className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" /> Malicious
+           </Badge>
+         );
+       case 'suspicious':
+         return (
+           <Badge variant="outline" className="bg-amber-50 text-amber-700 border-amber-200 dark:bg-amber-900/30 dark:text-amber-300 dark:border-amber-800">
+             <Shield className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" /> Suspicious
+           </Badge>
+         );
+       default:
+         return (
+           <Badge variant="outline" className="bg-slate-100 text-slate-700 border-slate-200 dark:bg-slate-800 dark:text-slate-300 dark:border-slate-700">
+             <Clock className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" /> Unknown
+           </Badge>
+         );
+     }
+   };
+   
+   return (
+     <div className="container mx-auto py-6 px-4 md:px-6 max-w-7xl">
+       <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-6">Scan Logs</h1>
+       
+       <Card>
+         <CardHeader>
+           <CardTitle>Recent Scan Results</CardTitle>
+           <CardDescription>
+             Review the results of recent file scans
+           </CardDescription>
+         </CardHeader>
+         <CardContent>
+           <div className="border rounded-lg overflow-hidden">
+             <table className="w-full">
+               <thead className="bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800/60 border-b border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700">
+                 <tr>
+                   <th className="text-left text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-wider px-6 py-3">
+                     File
+                   </th>
+                   <th className="text-left text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-wider px-6 py-3">
+                     Date
+                   </th>
+                   <th className="text-left text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-wider px-6 py-3">
+                     Engine
+                   </th>
+                   <th className="text-left text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-wider px-6 py-3">
+                     Status
+                   </th>
+                   <th className="text-left text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-wider px-6 py-3">
+                     Details
+                   </th>
+                 </tr>
+               </thead>
+               <tbody className="divide-y divide-slate-200 dark:divide-slate-700">
+                 {sampleLogs.map((log) => (
+                   <tr key={log.id} className="hover:bg-slate-50 dark:hover:bg-slate-800/50">
+                     <td className="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap">
+                       <div className="flex items-center">
+                         <FileText className="h-4 w-4 text-slate-400 mr-2" />
+                         <span className="text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 dark:text-slate-200">
+                           {log.filename}
+                         </span>
+                       </div>
+                     </td>
+                     <td className="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap text-sm text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400">
+                       {log.scanDate}
+                     </td>
+                     <td className="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap text-sm text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400">
+                       {log.engine}
+                     </td>
+                     <td className="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap">
+                       {getStatusBadge(log.status)}
+                     </td>
+                     <td className="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap text-sm text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400">
+                       {log.details}
+                     </td>
+                   </tr>
+                 ))}
+               </tbody>
+             </table>
+           </div>
+         </CardContent>
+       </Card>
+     </div>
+   );
+ } 
```

The fixes we've implemented should address the routing issues:

1. We switched from manually handling page state to using React Router for navigation
2. We set up the app to use RouterProvider with the router configuration
3. We implemented the missing pages (Convert, Scan, Logs)
4. We fixed the Convert component to use default export

The application is now loading without the previous errors. The routing is properly set up using React Router, and the issue with "Cannot destructure property 'basename' of 'React10.useContext(...)' as it is null" has been resolved.

To summarize the changes:

1. Updated the main.tsx to use RouterProvider instead of BrowserRouter with App component
2. Implemented the proper routing configuration in router.tsx
3. Created full implementations for the Convert, Scan, and Logs pages

```diff
+ }

+ export function Automate() {

+

+         { id: "s2", type: "output", config: { location: "default" } },
+       ],
+     },
+     {
+       id: "w2",
+       name: "Convert & Scan",
+       description: "Convert files and scan for threats",
+       steps: [
+         { id: "s1", type: "convert", config: { format: "all" } },
+         { id: "s2", type: "scan", config: { engine: "all" } },
+         { id: "s3", type: "output", config: { location: "default" } },
+       ],
+     },
+     {
+       id: "w3",
+       name: "Scan Only",
+       description: "Only scan files for threats without conversion",
+       steps: [
+         { id: "s1", type: "scan", config: { engine: "all" } },
+         { id: "s2", type: "output", config: { location: "quarantine" } },
+       ],
+     },
+   ];
+ 
+   const validateTaskForm = () => {
+     return (
+       taskData.name.trim() !== "" &&
+       taskData.description.trim() !== "" &&
+       taskData.assignee.trim() !== ""
+     );
+   };
+ 
+   const validateWorkflowSelection = () => {
+     return selectedWorkflow !== null;
+   };
+ 
+   const validateFileSelection = () => {
+     return filePath.trim() !== "";
+   };
+ 
+   const handleTaskInputChange = (field: keyof TaskFormData, value: string) => {
+     setTaskData((prev) => ({ ...prev, [field]: value }));
+   };
+ 
+   const handleNextStep = () => {
+     if (currentStep === 1 && !validateTaskForm()) return;
+     if (currentStep === 2 && !validateWorkflowSelection()) return;
+     
+     if (currentStep < 3) {
+       setCurrentStep(currentStep + 1);
+       if (currentStep === 1) setActiveTab("workflow");
+       if (currentStep === 2) setActiveTab("file");
+     } else {

+                 <span className="ml-2 capitalize">{workflow.steps[index + 1].type}</span>
+               </div>
+             )}
+           </div>
+         ))}
+       </div>
+     );
+   };
+ 
+   return (

+                   Back
+                 </Button>
+                 <Button 
+                   onClick={handleNextStep}
+                   disabled={!validateFileSelection()}
+                 >
+                   Start Processing
+                 </Button>
+               </div>
+             </TabsContent>
+           </Tabs>
+         </CardContent>
+       </Card>
+ 
+       <Dialog open={showDeleteDialog} onOpenChange={setShowDeleteDialog}>
+         <DialogContent>

+             <DialogTitle>Confirm Deletion</DialogTitle>
+             <DialogDescription>

+             </DialogDescription>
+           </DialogHeader>
+           <DialogFooter>
+             <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setShowDeleteDialog(false)}>
+               Cancel
+             </Button>
+             <Button variant="destructive" onClick={confirmDeleteWorkflow}>
+               Delete
+             </Button>
+           </DialogFooter>
+         </DialogContent>
+       </Dialog>
+     </div>
+   );
+ }
```

---

The application is now running successfully with our new Automate page. Here's a summary of what we've done:

1. **Created a new Automate page** - Implemented a comprehensive workflow automation page with three main tabs:
   - **Task Tab**: Collects task details including name, description, assignee, and system IP
   - **Workflow Tab**: Allows selecting predefined workflows or creating new ones with visual step diagrams
   - **File Tab**: Provides options for selecting files or folders for processing

2. **Added Workflow Navigation** - Updated the sidebar to include the new Automation menu item with appropriate icon

3. **Added Router Configuration** - Added the new route to the router.tsx file to make the page accessible

4. **Implemented Step-by-Step Process** - Created a guided workflow with validation between steps and next/back navigation

5. **Added Delete Functionality** - Implemented workflow deletion with a confirmation dialog to prevent accidental deletions

6. **Designed Visual Workflow Diagrams** - Added visual representation of workflow steps with appropriate icons and arrows

7. **Added File Selection Options** - Created options for selecting files manually or through a browse button

The UI follows the mockups you provided while enhancing them with modern design elements that match the rest of the application. The page is fully functional for the UI part with placeholders for the actual processing functionality that can be implemented later.

The page supports responsive design and maintains the same visual style as the rest of the application, ensuring a consistent user experience.

---

I've completely redesigned the Automate page with a more human-centered UI/UX and implemented a dynamic workflow builder that addresses your requirements. Here's what has been improved:

### Task Tab Improvements
1. **Better Layout & Structure**:
   - Two-column responsive layout for better information hierarchy
   - Clear visual indicators for required fields
   - Added priority selector for task prioritization
   - Improved input field labels and spacing

2. **Enhanced Visual Cues**:
   - Added badges to indicate required sections
   - Included step indicators in the tab navigation
   - Added system IP field with icon indication
   - Better button styling and clearer navigation flow

### Workflow Tab Complete Redesign
1. **Dynamic Flow Builder**:
   - Implemented a step-by-step workflow builder that visually connects steps
   - Each step is a card with specific configuration options
   - The type of step determines what options are available
   - Visual timeline showing the sequence of operations

2. **Smart Step Logic**:
   - When adding a new step, it intelligently suggests the next logical step type:
     - After "Convert" comes "Scan"
     - After "Scan" comes "Output"
     - After "Output" comes "Notification"
   - Each step has relevant configuration options:
     - Convert: choose file formats (all, eml, msg, pst, word)
     - Scan: select scan engines
     - Output: define output location
     - Notify: set notification method and recipients

3. **Interactive Controls**:
   - Add/remove steps with clear visual feedback
   - Confirmation dialog before removing steps
   - Helper tip explaining the workflow building process
   - Visual timelines connecting the workflow steps

### File Tab Improvements
1. **Better Organization**:
   - Consolidated file selection options into a card with clear sections
   - Added multiple configuration options (subfolders, preserve originals)
   - Better file path input with prominent browse button
   - Clear indication of source type selection

2. **Final Step Emphasis**:
   - Made the "Start Processing" button more prominent with blue highlighting
   - Clear navigation between steps

### Overall UI/UX Improvements
1. **Human-Designed Touch**:
   - More natural spacing and grouping of related elements
   - Better color contrast and visual hierarchy
   - Helpful tooltips and contextual information
   - Step indicators to show progress through the workflow setup

2. **Professional Polish**:
   - Consistent styling matching the rest of the application
   - Proper form validation before proceeding to next steps
   - Clear feedback on user actions
   - Responsive design that works on various screen sizes

The redesign maintains the functionality you requested while making it much more intuitive, visually appealing, and human-designed. The workflow builder now follows a flow diagram approach with connected steps that each have appropriate configuration options.

---

The workflow UI has been completely redesigned with the following improvements:

1. **Visual Flow Layout**:
   - Steps are now displayed horizontally in a flowchart-like design
   - Connected with arrows to show the process flow
   - Wraps to a new row with vertical arrows when needed

2. **New Workflow Steps**:
   - Extract Files - For extracting files from archives
   - Convert Files - For converting files to different formats
   - Remove File Types - For removing specific file types
   - Verify Files - For verifying file integrity
   - Remove Originals - For removing original files after processing
   - Scan Files - For scanning files with antivirus engines

3. **Enhanced Selection UI**:
   - Checkbox-style UI for selecting multiple conversion formats
   - Visual cards for selecting multiple scan engines
   - Checkbox grid for selecting file types to remove
   - "Select All" and "Clear All" buttons for quick selection

4. **Step Controls**:
   - Toggle switch to enable/disable each step
   - Ability to remove steps with the X button
   - Visual indication of disabled steps (dimmed opacity)
   - Step-specific configuration options

5. **Dynamic Step Addition**:
   - "Add next step" panel with icons for each step type
   - Only shows compatible step types
   - Allows adding multiple instances of common steps (convert/scan)

6. **Improved Visuals**:
   - Color-coded steps and icons for better visual distinction
   - Blue connectors between steps
   - Card-based design with clear borders
   - Improved spacing and layout

This design addresses all the requirements in your message, providing a more interactive, drag-drop feel with a mindmap-like layout and improved selection UI for file types and scan engines.

```diff
+ // Types for the Automation feature
+ export interface TaskFormData {
+   name: string;
+   description: string;
+   assignee: string;
+   systemIp: string;
+   priority: string;
+ }
+ 
+ export type FlowStepType = 'extract' | 'convert' | 'removeFileTypes' | 'verify' | 'removeOriginals' | 'scan';
+ export type ConversionFormat = 'all' | 'eml' | 'msg' | 'pst' | 'word' | 'pdf' | 'image';
+ export type ScanEngine = 'windows-defender' | 'trend-micro' | 'clam-av' | 'eset' | 'quick-heal';
+ export type FileType = 'bat' | 'exe' | 'js' | 'vbs' | 'ps1' | 'cmd' | 'sh';
+ 
+ export interface FlowStep {
+   id: string;
+   type: FlowStepType;
+   config: {
+     formats?: ConversionFormat[];
+     engines?: ScanEngine[];
+     fileTypes?: FileType[];
+     enabled?: boolean;
+     [key: string]: any;
+   };
+ }
+ 
+ export interface EngineOption {
+   id: ScanEngine;
+   name: string;
+   icon: React.ReactNode;
+ }
+ 
+ export interface FormatOption {
+   id: ConversionFormat;
+   name: string;
+ }
+ 
+ export interface FileTypeOption {
+   id: FileType;
+   name: string;
+ }
```

```diff
- 
+ import { FlowStepType, FlowStep } from './types';
+ import { 
+   Archive, File, Shield, Filter, CheckSquare, Trash2, Workflow
+ } from "lucide-react";
+ 
+ // Utility functions for the Automation feature
+ export function getStepIcon(type: FlowStepType) {
+   switch (type) {
+     case 'extract':
+       return <Archive className="h-5 w-5 text-indigo-500" />;
+     case 'convert':
+       return <File className="h-5 w-5 text-blue-500" />;
+     case 'scan':
+       return <Shield className="h-5 w-5 text-red-500" />;
+     case 'removeFileTypes':
+       return <Filter className="h-5 w-5 text-amber-500" />;
+     case 'verify':
+       return <CheckSquare className="h-5 w-5 text-green-500" />;
+     case 'removeOriginals':
+       return <Trash2 className="h-5 w-5 text-rose-500" />;
+     default:
+       return <Workflow className="h-5 w-5" />;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ export function getStepTitle(type: FlowStepType) {
+   switch (type) {
+     case 'extract':
+       return 'Extract Files';
+     case 'convert':
+       return 'Convert Files';
+     case 'scan':
+       return 'Scan Files';
+     case 'removeFileTypes':
+       return 'Remove File Types';
+     case 'verify':
+       return 'Verify Files';
+     case 'removeOriginals':
+       return 'Remove Originals';
+     default:
+       return 'Step';
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ export function getStepDescription(type: FlowStepType) {
+   switch (type) {
+     case 'extract':
+       return 'Extract files from archives and containers';
+     case 'convert':
+       return 'Convert files to desired formats';
+     case 'scan':
+       return 'Scan files with antivirus engines';
+     case 'removeFileTypes':
+       return 'Remove specified file types';
+     case 'verify':
+       return 'Verify file integrity and content';
+     case 'removeOriginals':
+       return 'Remove original files after processing';
+     default:
+       return '';
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ export function validateTaskForm(taskData: { 
+   name: string, 
+   description: string, 
+   assignee: string 
+ }) {
+   return (
+     taskData.name.trim() !== "" &&
+     taskData.description.trim() !== "" &&
+     taskData.assignee.trim() !== ""
+   );
+ }
+ 
+ export function validateWorkflowSelection(flowSteps: FlowStep[]) {
+   return flowSteps.length > 0;
+ }
+ 
+ export function validateFileSelection(filePath: string) {
+   return filePath.trim() !== "";
+ }
+ 
+ // Define a CheckIcon component to use in the checkboxes
+ export function CheckIcon(props: React.SVGProps<SVGSVGElement>) {
+   return (
+     <svg
+       {...props}
+       fill="none"
+       viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+       stroke="currentColor"
+       strokeWidth={3}
+     >
+       <path
+         strokeLinecap="round"
+         strokeLinejoin="round"
+         d="M5 13l4 4L19 7"
+       />
+     </svg>
+   );
+ } 
```

```diff
+ import React from 'react';
+ import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
+ import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
+ import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label";
+ import { Textarea } from "@/components/ui/textarea";
+ import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from "@/components/ui/select";
+ import { Settings, ChevronRight } from "lucide-react";
+ import { TaskFormData } from './types';
+ import { validateTaskForm } from './validators';
+ 
+ interface TaskFormProps {
+   taskData: TaskFormData;
+   onInputChange: (field: keyof TaskFormData, value: string) => void;
+   onNextStep: () => void;
+ }
+ 
+ export function TaskForm({ taskData, onInputChange, onNextStep }: TaskFormProps) {
+   return (
+     <div className="space-y-6">
+       <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
+         <div className="space-y-4">
+           <div>
+             <Label htmlFor="task-name" className="text-sm font-medium">
+               Task Name <span className="text-red-500">*</span>
+             </Label>
+             <Input 
+               id="task-name" 
+               placeholder="Enter descriptive task name"
+               className="mt-1.5"
+               value={taskData.name}
+               onChange={(e) => onInputChange("name", e.target.value)}
+             />
+           </div>
+           
+           <div>
+             <Label htmlFor="assignee" className="text-sm font-medium">
+               Assignee <span className="text-red-500">*</span>
+             </Label>
+             <Input 
+               id="assignee" 
+               placeholder="Enter assignee name"
+               className="mt-1.5"
+               value={taskData.assignee}
+               onChange={(e) => onInputChange("assignee", e.target.value)}
+             />
+           </div>
+           
+           <div>
+             <Label htmlFor="priority" className="text-sm font-medium">
+               Priority
+             </Label>
+             <Select 
+               value={taskData.priority} 
+               onValueChange={(value) => onInputChange("priority", value)}
+             >
+               <SelectTrigger className="mt-1.5">
+                 <SelectValue placeholder="Select priority" />
+               </SelectTrigger>
+               <SelectContent>
+                 <SelectItem value="low">Low</SelectItem>
+                 <SelectItem value="medium">Medium</SelectItem>
+                 <SelectItem value="high">High</SelectItem>
+               </SelectContent>
+             </Select>
+           </div>
+         </div>
+         
+         <div className="space-y-4">
+           <div>
+             <Label htmlFor="description" className="text-sm font-medium">
+               Description <span className="text-red-500">*</span>
+             </Label>
+             <Textarea 
+               id="description" 
+               placeholder="Enter task description"
+               className="mt-1.5 min-h-[120px]"
+               value={taskData.description}
+               onChange={(e) => onInputChange("description", e.target.value)}
+             />
+           </div>
+           
+           <div>
+             <Label htmlFor="system-ip" className="text-sm font-medium">
+               System IP
+             </Label>
+             <div className="relative mt-1.5">
+               <Input 
+                 id="system-ip" 
+                 value={taskData.systemIp}
+                 disabled
+                 className="pr-10 bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800/50 text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400"
+               />
+               <Settings className="absolute right-3 top-1/2 transform -translate-y-1/2 h-4 w-4 text-slate-400" />
+             </div>
+             <p className="text-xs text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400 mt-1">
+               System IP is automatically detected
+             </p>
+           </div>
+         </div>
+       </div>
+       
+       <div className="flex justify-end pt-4 border-t border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700">
+         <Button 
+           onClick={onNextStep}
+           disabled={!validateTaskForm(taskData)}
+           className="px-6"
+         >
+           Continue to Workflow
+           <ChevronRight className="ml-2 h-4 w-4" />
+         </Button>
+       </div>
+     </div>
+   );
+ } 
```

```diff
+ import React from 'react';
+ import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
+ import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
+ import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label";
+ import { Card, CardContent } from "@/components/ui/card";
+ import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from "@/components/ui/select";
+ import { Switch } from "@/components/ui/switch";
+ import { FolderOpen, File, ChevronRight } from "lucide-react";
+ import { validateFileSelection } from './validators';
+ 
+ interface FileSelectionFormProps {
+   filePath: string;
+   selectedFileType: string;
+   onFilePathChange: (path: string) => void;
+   onFileTypeChange: (type: string) => void;
+   onNextStep: () => void;
+   onPrevStep: () => void;
+ }
+ 
+ export function FileSelectionForm({ 
+   filePath, 
+   selectedFileType, 
+   onFilePathChange, 
+   onFileTypeChange, 
+   onNextStep, 
+   onPrevStep 
+ }: FileSelectionFormProps) {
+   return (
+     <div className="space-y-6">
+       <Card className="border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700">
+         <CardContent className="p-6 space-y-6">
+           <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
+             <div>
+               <Label htmlFor="file-type" className="text-sm font-medium">
+                 Source Type
+               </Label>
+               <Select value={selectedFileType} onValueChange={onFileTypeChange}>
+                 <SelectTrigger id="file-type" className="mt-1.5">
+                   <SelectValue />
+                 </SelectTrigger>
+                 <SelectContent>
+                   <SelectItem value="folder">Folder (Process all files)</SelectItem>
+                   <SelectItem value="file">Specific Files</SelectItem>
+                 </SelectContent>
+               </Select>
+             </div>
+             
+             <div>
+               <Label htmlFor="file-path" className="text-sm font-medium">
+                 File Path <span className="text-red-500">*</span>
+               </Label>
+               <div className="flex mt-1.5 space-x-2">
+                 <Input 
+                   id="file-path" 
+                   placeholder="Enter file or folder path"
+                   className="flex-1"
+                   value={filePath}
+                   onChange={(e) => onFilePathChange(e.target.value)}
+                 />
+                 <Button variant="secondary" className="shrink-0">
+                   {selectedFileType === 'folder' ? (
+                     <>
+                       <FolderOpen className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
+                       Browse
+                     </>
+                   ) : (
+                     <>
+                       <File className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
+                       Browse
+                     </>
+                   )}
+                 </Button>
+               </div>
+             </div>
+           </div>
+           
+           <div className="space-y-4 pt-4 border-t border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700">
+             <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
+               <div className="space-y-0.5">
+                 <Label htmlFor="include-subfolders" className="text-sm font-medium">
+                   Include Subfolders
+                 </Label>
+                 <p className="text-xs text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400">
+                   Process files in subfolders recursively
+                 </p>
+               </div>
+               <Switch id="include-subfolders" defaultChecked />
+             </div>
+             
+             <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
+               <div className="space-y-0.5">
+                 <Label htmlFor="preserve-originals" className="text-sm font-medium">
+                   Preserve Original Files
+                 </Label>
+                 <p className="text-xs text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400">
+                   Keep original files after processing
+                 </p>
+               </div>
+               <Switch id="preserve-originals" defaultChecked />
+             </div>
+           </div>
+         </CardContent>
+       </Card>
+       
+       <div className="flex justify-between pt-4 border-t border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700">
+         <Button variant="outline" onClick={onPrevStep}>
+           Back to Workflow
+         </Button>
+         <Button 
+           onClick={onNextStep}
+           disabled={!validateFileSelection(filePath)}
+           className="px-6 bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700"
+         >
+           Start Processing
+         </Button>
+       </div>
+     </div>
+   );
+ }
```
