```diff
- 
+ import React from 'react';
+ import { Card, CardHeader, CardContent, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
+ import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label";
+ import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
+ import { Switch } from "@/components/ui/switch";
+ import { X } from "lucide-react";
+ import { FlowStep, FlowStepType, ConversionFormat, ScanEngine, FileType } from './types';
+ import { getStepIcon, getStepTitle, getStepDescription, CheckIcon } from './icons';
+ 
+ interface FlowStepCardProps {
+   step: FlowStep;
+   index: number;
+   availableFormats: { id: ConversionFormat, name: string }[];
+   availableEngines: { id: ScanEngine, name: string, icon: React.ReactNode }[];
+   availableFileTypes: { id: FileType, name: string }[];
+   onRemove: () => void;
+   onToggleEnabled: () => void;
+   onToggleFormat: (format: ConversionFormat) => void;
+   onToggleAllFormats: () => void;
+   onToggleEngine: (engine: ScanEngine) => void;
+   onToggleAllEngines: () => void;
+   onToggleFileType: (fileType: FileType) => void;
+   onToggleAllFileTypes: () => void;
+ }
+ 
+ export function FlowStepCard({
+   step,
+   index,
+   availableFormats,
+   availableEngines,
+   availableFileTypes,
+   onRemove,
+   onToggleEnabled,
+   onToggleFormat,
+   onToggleAllFormats,
+   onToggleEngine,
+   onToggleAllEngines,
+   onToggleFileType,
+   onToggleAllFileTypes
+ }: FlowStepCardProps) {
+   return (
+     <div className={`relative flex-none w-64 ${!step.config.enabled ? 'opacity-60' : ''}`}>
+       <Card className={`border-2 ${step.config.enabled ? 'border-blue-300 dark:border-blue-800' : 'border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700'} shadow-sm`}>
+         <CardHeader className="p-4 pb-2 flex flex-row items-center justify-between">
+           <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
+             <div className={`w-8 h-8 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center ${
+               step.config.enabled 
+                 ? 'bg-blue-100 dark:bg-blue-900 text-blue-600 dark:text-blue-400' 
+                 : 'bg-slate-100 dark:bg-slate-800 text-slate-500'
+             }`}>
+               {getStepIcon(step.type)}
+             </div>
+             <CardTitle className="text-base font-medium">{getStepTitle(step.type)}</CardTitle>
+           </div>
+           
+           <div className="flex items-center space-x-1">
+             <Switch 
+               id={`step-enabled-${index}`} 
+               checked={step.config.enabled ?? true}
+               onCheckedChange={onToggleEnabled}
+               className="scale-75 data-[state=checked]:bg-blue-600"
+             />
+           </div>
+         </CardHeader>
+         
+         <CardContent className="p-4 pt-2">
+           <p className="text-xs text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400 mb-3">
+             {getStepDescription(step.type)}
+           </p>
+           
+           {/* Step-specific configuration */}
+           {step.type === 'extract' && (
+             <div className="space-y-3">
+               <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
+                 <Label htmlFor={`extract-nested-${index}`} className="text-xs font-medium">
+                   Extract Nested Archives
+                 </Label>
+                 <Switch id={`extract-nested-${index}`} defaultChecked />
+               </div>
+               <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
+                 <Label htmlFor={`extract-password-${index}`} className="text-xs font-medium">
+                   Try Default Passwords
+                 </Label>
+                 <Switch id={`extract-password-${index}`} defaultChecked />
+               </div>
+             </div>
+           )}
+           
+           {step.type === 'convert' && (
+             <div className="space-y-2">
+               <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
+                 <Label className="text-xs font-medium">Formats to Convert</Label>
+                 <Button 
+                   variant="outline" 
+                   size="sm" 
+                   className="h-6 text-xs"
+                   onClick={onToggleAllFormats}
+                 >
+                   {step.config.formats?.length === availableFormats.length ? 'Clear All' : 'Select All'}
+                 </Button>
+               </div>
+               <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-1">
+                 {availableFormats.map(format => (
+                   <div 
+                     key={format.id}
+                     className={`px-2 py-1.5 rounded-md text-xs flex items-center space-x-1.5 cursor-pointer ${
+                       step.config.formats?.includes(format.id)
+                         ? 'bg-blue-100 dark:bg-blue-900/40 text-blue-700 dark:text-blue-300'
+                         : 'bg-slate-100 dark:bg-slate-800 text-slate-700 dark:text-slate-300'
+                     }`}
+                     onClick={() => onToggleFormat(format.id)}
+                   >
+                     <div className={`w-3 h-3 rounded-sm border ${
+                       step.config.formats?.includes(format.id)
+                         ? 'bg-blue-500 border-blue-500 dark:bg-blue-600 dark:border-blue-600'
+                         : 'bg-white border-slate-300 dark:bg-slate-700 dark:border-slate-600'
+                     }`}>
+                       {step.config.formats?.includes(format.id) && (
+                         <CheckIcon className="w-3 h-3 text-white" />
+                       )}
+                     </div>
+                     <span>{format.name}</span>
+                   </div>
+                 ))}
+               </div>
+             </div>
+           )}
+           
+           {step.type === 'scan' && (
+             <div className="space-y-2">
+               <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
+                 <Label className="text-xs font-medium">Select Scan Engines</Label>
+                 <Button 
+                   variant="outline" 
+                   size="sm" 
+                   className="h-6 text-xs"
+                   onClick={onToggleAllEngines}
+                 >
+                   {step.config.engines?.length === availableEngines.length ? 'Clear All' : 'Select All'}
+                 </Button>
+               </div>
+               <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-1">
+                 {availableEngines.map(engine => (
+                   <div 
+                     key={engine.id}
+                     className={`px-2 py-1.5 rounded-md text-xs flex items-center justify-between cursor-pointer ${
+                       step.config.engines?.includes(engine.id)
+                         ? 'bg-blue-100 dark:bg-blue-900/40 text-blue-700 dark:text-blue-300'
+                         : 'bg-slate-100 dark:bg-slate-800 text-slate-700 dark:text-slate-300'
+                     }`}
+                     onClick={() => onToggleEngine(engine.id)}
+                   >
+                     <div className="flex items-center space-x-1.5">
+                       <div className={`w-3 h-3 rounded-sm border ${
+                         step.config.engines?.includes(engine.id)
+                           ? 'bg-blue-500 border-blue-500 dark:bg-blue-600 dark:border-blue-600'
+                           : 'bg-white border-slate-300 dark:bg-slate-700 dark:border-slate-600'
+                       }`}>
+                         {step.config.engines?.includes(engine.id) && (
+                           <CheckIcon className="w-3 h-3 text-white" />
+                         )}
+                       </div>
+                       <span>{engine.name}</span>
+                     </div>
+                     {engine.icon}
+                   </div>
+                 ))}
+               </div>
+             </div>
+           )}
+           
+           {step.type === 'removeFileTypes' && (
+             <div className="space-y-2">
+               <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
+                 <Label className="text-xs font-medium">File Types to Remove</Label>
+                 <Button 
+                   variant="outline" 
+                   size="sm" 
+                   className="h-6 text-xs"
+                   onClick={onToggleAllFileTypes}
+                 >
+                   {step.config.fileTypes?.length === availableFileTypes.length ? 'Clear All' : 'Select All'}
+                 </Button>
+               </div>
+               <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-1">
+                 {availableFileTypes.map(fileType => (
+                   <div 
+                     key={fileType.id}
+                     className={`px-2 py-1.5 rounded-md text-xs flex items-center space-x-1.5 cursor-pointer ${
+                       step.config.fileTypes?.includes(fileType.id)
+                         ? 'bg-blue-100 dark:bg-blue-900/40 text-blue-700 dark:text-blue-300'
+                         : 'bg-slate-100 dark:bg-slate-800 text-slate-700 dark:text-slate-300'
+                     }`}
+                     onClick={() => onToggleFileType(fileType.id)}
+                   >
+                     <div className={`w-3 h-3 rounded-sm border ${
+                       step.config.fileTypes?.includes(fileType.id)
+                         ? 'bg-blue-500 border-blue-500 dark:bg-blue-600 dark:border-blue-600'
+                         : 'bg-white border-slate-300 dark:bg-slate-700 dark:border-slate-600'
+                     }`}>
+                       {step.config.fileTypes?.includes(fileType.id) && (
+                         <CheckIcon className="w-3 h-3 text-white" />
+                       )}
+                     </div>
+                     <span>{fileType.name}</span>
+                   </div>
+                 ))}
+               </div>
+             </div>
+           )}
+           
+           {step.type === 'verify' && (
+             <div className="space-y-3">
+               <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
+                 <Label htmlFor={`verify-hash-${index}`} className="text-xs font-medium">
+                   Verify File Hash
+                 </Label>
+                 <Switch id={`verify-hash-${index}`} defaultChecked />
+               </div>
+               <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
+                 <Label htmlFor={`verify-structure-${index}`} className="text-xs font-medium">
+                   Verify File Structure
+                 </Label>
+                 <Switch id={`verify-structure-${index}`} defaultChecked />
+               </div>
+             </div>
+           )}
+           
+           {step.type === 'removeOriginals' && (
+             <div className="space-y-3">
+               <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
+                 <Label htmlFor={`secure-delete-${index}`} className="text-xs font-medium">
+                   Secure Delete
+                 </Label>
+                 <Switch id={`secure-delete-${index}`} defaultChecked />
+               </div>
+               <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
+                 <Label htmlFor={`keep-log-${index}`} className="text-xs font-medium">
+                   Keep Deletion Log
+                 </Label>
+                 <Switch id={`keep-log-${index}`} defaultChecked />
+               </div>
+             </div>
+           )}
+         </CardContent>
+         
+         <div className="absolute -top-2 -right-2">
+           <Button 
+             size="icon"
+             variant="destructive"
+             className="h-6 w-6 rounded-full"
+             onClick={onRemove}
+           >
+             <X className="h-3 w-3" />
+           </Button>
+         </div>
+       </Card>
+     </div>
+   );
+ } 
```

+ import React from 'react';
+ import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
+ import { Plus } from "lucide-react";
+ import { FlowStep, FlowStepType } from './types';
+ import { getStepIcon, getStepTitle } from './icons';
+ 
+ interface AddStepPanelProps {
+   flowSteps: FlowStep[];
+   onAddStep: (type: FlowStepType) => void;
+ }
+ 
+ export function AddStepPanel({ flowSteps, onAddStep }: AddStepPanelProps) {
+   return (
+     <div className="flex-none w-64">
+       <div className="border-2 border-dashed border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-lg h-full min-h-[180px] flex items-center justify-center">
+         <div className="text-center p-4">
+           <Plus className="h-8 w-8 mx-auto text-slate-400 dark:text-slate-600 mb-2" />
+           <p className="text-sm text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400 mb-4">Add next step</p>
+           <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 justify-center">
+             {['convert', 'scan', 'removeFileTypes', 'verify', 'removeOriginals', 'extract'].map((type: string) => 
+               // Allow multiple instances of convert/scan, but only one of each other type
+               !flowSteps.some(s => s.type === type as FlowStepType) || type === 'convert' || type === 'scan' ? (
+                 <Button
+                   key={type}
+                   variant="outline"
+                   size="sm"
+                   className="text-xs"
+                   onClick={() => onAddStep(type as FlowStepType)}
+                 >
+                   {getStepIcon(type as FlowStepType)}
+                   <span className="ml-1">{getStepTitle(type as FlowStepType)}</span>
+                 </Button>
+               ) : null
+             )}
+           </div>
+         </div>
+       </div>
+     </div>
+   );
+ }

```diff
-  
+ import React from 'react';
+ import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
+ import { ChevronRight, X } from "lucide-react";
+ import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
+ import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogDescription, DialogFooter, DialogHeader, DialogTitle } from "@/components/ui/dialog";
+ import { FlowStep, FlowStepType, ConversionFormat, ScanEngine, FileType } from './types';
+ import { FlowStepCard } from './FlowStepCard';
+ import { AddStepPanel } from './AddStepPanel';
+ import { validateWorkflowSelection } from './validators';
+ 
+ interface WorkflowBuilderProps {
+   flowSteps: FlowStep[];
+   availableFormats: { id: ConversionFormat, name: string }[];
+   availableEngines: { id: ScanEngine, name: string, icon: React.ReactNode }[];
+   availableFileTypes: { id: FileType, name: string }[];
+   showDeleteDialog: boolean;
+   stepToDelete: number | null;
+   showHelpTip: boolean;
+   onToggleHelpTip: () => void;
+   onAddStep: (type: FlowStepType) => void;
+   onRemoveStep: (index: number) => void;
+   onConfirmDeleteStep: () => void;
+   onToggleDeleteDialog: (show: boolean) => void;
+   onToggleStepEnabled: (index: number) => void;
+   onToggleFormat: (index: number, format: ConversionFormat) => void;
+   onToggleAllFormats: (index: number) => void;
+   onToggleEngine: (index: number, engine: ScanEngine) => void;
+   onToggleAllEngines: (index: number) => void;
+   onToggleFileType: (index: number, fileType: FileType) => void;
+   onToggleAllFileTypes: (index: number) => void;
+   onPrevStep: () => void;
+   onNextStep: () => void;
+ }
+ 
+ export function WorkflowBuilder({
+   flowSteps,
+   availableFormats,
+   availableEngines,
+   availableFileTypes,
+   showDeleteDialog,
+   stepToDelete,
+   showHelpTip,
+   onToggleHelpTip,
+   onAddStep,
+   onRemoveStep,
+   onConfirmDeleteStep,
+   onToggleDeleteDialog,
+   onToggleStepEnabled,
+   onToggleFormat,
+   onToggleAllFormats,
+   onToggleEngine,
+   onToggleAllEngines,
+   onToggleFileType,
+   onToggleAllFileTypes,
+   onPrevStep,
+   onNextStep
+ }: WorkflowBuilderProps) {
+   return (
+     <div className="space-y-6">
+       <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
+         <div className="flex items-center">
+           <h2 className="text-lg font-medium">Build Your Workflow</h2>
+           <Badge variant="outline" className="ml-2 bg-blue-50 text-blue-700 border-blue-200 dark:bg-blue-900/20 dark:text-blue-300 dark:border-blue-800">
+             Required
+           </Badge>
+         </div>
+ 
+         {showHelpTip && (
+           <div className="relative bg-amber-50 dark:bg-amber-900/20 text-amber-800 dark:text-amber-300 p-3 rounded-lg text-sm pr-10 border border-amber-200 dark:border-amber-800/50 max-w-sm">
+             <Button 
+               size="icon" 
+               variant="ghost" 
+               className="absolute right-1 top-1 h-6 w-6 text-amber-600 dark:text-amber-400 hover:text-amber-800"
+               onClick={onToggleHelpTip}
+             >
+               <X className="h-3 w-3" />
+             </Button>
+             <p>
+               Create your workflow by adding and configuring steps. Each step will be executed in the order shown.
+             </p>
+           </div>
+         )}
+       </div>
+       
+       <div className="p-6 bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-900 rounded-lg border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 overflow-x-auto">
+         <div className="flex flex-col space-y-6 min-w-[600px]">
+           {flowSteps.map((step, index) => (
+             <div key={step.id}>
+               <div className="flex items-start space-x-4">
+                 <FlowStepCard
+                   step={step}
+                   index={index}
+                   availableFormats={availableFormats}
+                   availableEngines={availableEngines}
+                   availableFileTypes={availableFileTypes}
+                   onRemove={() => onRemoveStep(index)}
+                   onToggleEnabled={() => onToggleStepEnabled(index)}
+                   onToggleFormat={(format) => onToggleFormat(index, format)}
+                   onToggleAllFormats={() => onToggleAllFormats(index)}
+                   onToggleEngine={(engine) => onToggleEngine(index, engine)}
+                   onToggleAllEngines={() => onToggleAllEngines(index)}
+                   onToggleFileType={(fileType) => onToggleFileType(index, fileType)}
+                   onToggleAllFileTypes={() => onToggleAllFileTypes(index)}
+                 />
+                 
+                 {index < flowSteps.length - 1 && (
+                   <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-full flex-1 py-10">
+                     <div className="h-0.5 w-full bg-blue-200 dark:bg-blue-800 relative">
+                       <div className="absolute top-1/2 right-3 transform -translate-y-1/2">
+                         <div className="bg-blue-500 dark:bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-full p-1">
+                           <ChevronRight className="h-4 w-4" />
+                         </div>
+                       </div>
+                     </div>
+                   </div>
+                 )}
+                 
+                 {index === flowSteps.length - 1 && (
+                   <AddStepPanel
+                     flowSteps={flowSteps}
+                     onAddStep={onAddStep}
+                   />
+                 )}
+               </div>
+               
+               {index < flowSteps.length - 1 && (index + 1) % 2 === 0 && (
+                 <div className="flex justify-center my-2">
+                   <div className="h-8 w-8 rounded-full bg-blue-500 dark:bg-blue-600 text-white flex items-center justify-center rotate-90 mx-auto">
+                     <ChevronRight className="h-5 w-5" />
+                   </div>
+                 </div>
+               )}
+             </div>
+           ))}
+         </div>
+       </div>
+       
+       <div className="flex justify-between pt-4 border-t border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700">
+         <Button variant="outline" onClick={onPrevStep}>
+           Back to Task
+         </Button>
+         <Button 
+           onClick={onNextStep}
+           disabled={!validateWorkflowSelection(flowSteps)}
+         >
+           Continue to Files
+           <ChevronRight className="ml-2 h-4 w-4" />
+         </Button>
+       </div>
+ 
+       <Dialog open={showDeleteDialog} onOpenChange={onToggleDeleteDialog}>
+         <DialogContent>
+           <DialogHeader>
+             <DialogTitle>Confirm Removal</DialogTitle>
+             <DialogDescription>
+               Are you sure you want to remove this workflow step? This action cannot be undone.
+             </DialogDescription>
+           </DialogHeader>
+           <DialogFooter>
+             <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => onToggleDeleteDialog(false)}>
+               Cancel
+             </Button>
+             <Button variant="destructive" onClick={onConfirmDeleteStep}>
+               Remove
+             </Button>
+           </DialogFooter>
+         </DialogContent>
+       </Dialog>
+     </div>
+   );
+ }
```
